name: Spicy Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Garlic salt or 1 garlic pod
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine catsup, chili sauce, and prepared horseradish.
2. Add chopped onions and chopped green peppers to the mixture.
3. Stir in Worcestershire sauce, salt, garlic salt or minced garlic pod, vinegar, Tobasco sauce, and sugar.
4. Allow the sauce to stand in the refrigerator for several hours before serving.
